raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_factual_claim","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"It is not common for parents to have to flush their children's clothing away.","distilled_fact":"It is not common for parents to have to flush their children's clothing away."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_factual_claim","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"In most cases, soiled clothing can be cleaned and kept, or disposed of in a trash bin.","distilled_fact":"In most cases, soiled clothing can be cleaned and kept or disposed of in a trash bin."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_factual_claim","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"Flushing clothing down the toilet is not a typical method of disposal and should only be done in emergency situations, such as when the clothing is contaminated with a hazardous substance.","distilled_fact":"Flushing clothing down the toilet is not a typical method of disposal and should only be done in emergency situations when the clothing is contaminated with a hazardous substance."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_factual_claim","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"It is generally not recommended to flush clothing down the toilet, as it can clog the pipes and cause other issues.","distilled_fact":"It is generally not recommended to flush clothing down the toilet because it can clog the pipes and cause other issues."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_factual_claim","confidence":0.87,"matched_text":"Therefore, it is not something that most parents have to do on a regular basis.","distilled_fact":"It is not something that most parents have to do on a regular basis."}]}
